desc: The new damsleth/linux wallace/t6040-bringup branch integrates the former t6040-usb-wip stack with the T6040 DT/PMGR line on AsahiLinux asahi-wip. The standard DockChannel harness now applies the refreshed PMGR/SART/binding patches and builds all available DTBs. Remaining acceptance: run the USB_HOST=1 image build with dts/t6040-j614s-dcuart-usb-host.dts and preserve the resulting external-root artifacts for ticket 032.
author: claude
